name: greedyclaw
description: Greedy Claw 任务平台智能竞标助手 - TypeScript + ESM 打包

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && tsc && esbuild src/sidecar/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/sidecar/server.cjs && cp SKILL.md openclaw.plugin.json package.json dist/ && mkdir -p dist/plugin && cp openclaw.plugin.json dist/plugin/

author: OpenClaw

openclaw.description: 在线接单平台智能竞标助手
